references.key: see if each test matches the instruction
references.raw: While the agent is solving the task, take a look at test.gd. See if each test matches the instruction. If not, fix. You can usually catch some easy errors, such as named node/function tests.
references.title: See if each test matches the instruction

references.raw: After the agent finishes, run validation. See if it passes / fails.
references.title: See if it passes / fails

references.key: ask the agent if it missed anything
references.raw: If the agent failed, pass the test.gd in. Ask the agent if it missed anything. Ask the agent if the things it missed are due to its own error or due to ambiguous instruction/overly strict tests. This is my usual prompt :
references.title: Ask the agent if it missed anything
